claims.summary: The 768D-to-8D projection basis must be deterministic and stable within the process.
claims.disposition: Verified fixed-seed construction, OnceLock initialization, and deterministic replay tests.

claims.summary: Projection basis health must remain observational and must not rewrite live weights.
Every projection column should remain finite and above the near-zero threshold.
claims.disposition: Verified no dead dimensions and finite normalized columns.

claims.summary: The near-zero threshold should be compared with the actual minimum raw column norm.
claims.disposition: Verified the existing minimum-threshold margin ratio and deterministic health test.

claims.summary: A sample projection should match the normalized deterministic basis.
claims.disposition: Verified existing projection parity and deterministic output fixtures.
